summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today; the main contract I2405 closed 943. As the Spring Fesτιval approaches,some traders have already closed down. And the pre holiday restocking of steel mills has basically ended, with fewer inquiries and almost stagnant market transacτιons..
